seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Coolum and Mount Coot-tha. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Coolum vs Mount Coot-tha: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Coolum and Mount Coot-tha.
heading: Mount Coolum vs Mount Coot-tha — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Coolum, Queensland and Mount Coot-tha, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Coolum has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Mount Coot-tha (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Coolum or Mount Coot-tha safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Coolum has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Mount Coot-tha scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Coolum scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Coot-tha scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Coolum or Mount Coot-tha?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Coolum has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
